claim_title: ADR README index is stale for late-series ADRs

results.description: Verify ADR README index is aligned and includes 054/055.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
readme = Path("docs/governance/adrs/README.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
ids = ["047","048","049","050","051","052","053"]
mismatch = 0
for adr in ids:
    line = next((ln for ln in readme.splitlines() if f"[{adr}]" in ln), "")
    if "| Proposed |" not in line:
        continue
    f = next(Path("docs/governance/adrs").glob(f"{adr}-*.md"))
    text = f.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    status_match = re.search(r"^## Status\n(.+)$", text, flags=re.MULTILINE)
    status = status_match.group(1).strip() if status_match else "<missing>"
    if not status.startswith("Proposed"):
        mismatch += 1
missing = [adr for adr in ["054", "055"] if f"[{adr}]" not in readme]
print(f"MISMATCH_COUNT={mismatch}")
print(f"MISSING_COUNT={len(missing)}")
print("MISSING_IDS=" + ",".join(missing))
if mismatch == 0 and len(missing) == 0:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
